def negative_sqlalchemy_n_plus_one_lazy_load():
    rule_id = "sqlalchemy_n_plus_one_lazy_load"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "SQLAlchemy query shapes suggest lazy-loaded N+1 access with no visible eager loading."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
